--show-source-context    Append source context to references
--web-config-path        Path to web.config that contain i18n.* settings.
--verbose                Set output to verbose.
--watch                  Automatically rebuild pot if any translatable files
changes.
--watch-delay            Delay between each build (throttling). Default value
is 500 ms.
--help                   Display this help screen.
--version                Display version information.

options.description:
Automatically rebuild pot if any translatable files
changes.

Delay between each build (throttling). Default value
is 500 ms.
